data:
# Boundary Interface Analysis - chronicCareAIPlatform

## 1. Entry Points (Microservice Bootstrap)

| Service | Port | Annotations | Key Features |
|---------|------|-------------|--------------|
| HealthCenterConsumerApplication | 8087 | @SpringBootApplication, @EnableDubbo | Consumer BFF, scans utils package |
| HealthCenterProviderApplication | - | @SpringBootApplication, @EnableDubbo, @EnableDiscoveryClient | Dubbo provider with Nacos |
| AccountProviderApplication | - | @SpringBootApplication, @EnableDiscoveryClient, @MapperScan | MyBatis mapper scan |
| DoctorConsumerApplication | 8086 | @SpringBootApplication, @EnableDubbo | Doctor workbench BFF |
| DoctorProviderApplication | 8085 | @SpringBootApplication, @EnableDubbo, @MapperScan | Dubbo port 20885 |
| AuthProviderApplication | - | @SpringBootApplication, @EnableDubbo, @EnableDiscoveryClient | Auth token services |
| AuthConsumerApplication | - | @SpringBootApplication | SSO endpoints |
| MessageConsumerApplication | - | @SpringBootApplication, @EnableDubbo | Message BFF |
| MessageProviderApplication | 8083 | @SpringBootApplication, @EnableDubbo, @MapperScan | Dubbo port 20883 |
| ThirdPartyProviderApplication | - | @SpringBootApplication(exclude=DataSource*) | No DB, third-party adapters |
| GatewayApplication | 8080 | @SpringBootApplication, @EnableDiscoveryClient, @EnableDubbo | API Gateway |

## 2. HTTP API Controllers

### HealthReportController
```
@RestController @RequestMapping("/health/report")
POST /upload - uploadReport(patientId, reportType, file, ...) -> Result<UploadReportResponse>
GET /list - queryReportList(patientId, filters, pagination) -> Result<QueryReportListResponse>
GET /detail - getReportDetail(reportId) -> Result<GetReportDetailResponse>
```
- **Security**: @RequireRole("PATIENT"), @RequirePermission("health:report:read|write")
- **File Validation**: 10MB limit, MIME whitelist (png/jpg/jpeg/pdf)

### DoctorWorkbenchController
```
@RestController @RequestMapping("/doctor/workbench") @RequireRole("DOCTOR")
POST /schedule/generate - AI schedule suggestion
GET /schedule/list - querySchedule
GET /schedule/detail - getScheduleDetail
POST /schedule/complete - completeSchedule with diagnosis
POST /schedule/cancel - cancelSchedule
POST /schedule/status - updateScheduleStatus
GET /info - getDoctorInfo
```
- **Security**: X-User-Id header from Gateway, @RequirePermission("doctor:read|write")

### SSOController
```
@RestController @RequestMapping("/auth")
POST /login - login(LoginRequest) -> Result
POST /register - register (not implemented)
POST /sms/code - sendSmsCode (not implemented)
POST /refresh - refreshToken
POST /validate - validateToken
POST /logout - revokeToken
```

### MessageController
```
@RestController @RequestMapping("/message")
GET /inbox, /sent - query messages
GET /detail - getMessageDetail
POST /read, /batch-read - markAsRead
POST /delete, /batch-delete - deleteMessage
GET /unread-count - getUnreadCount
```

## 3. Dubbo RPC APIs

### HealthReportAPI
```java
UploadReportResponse uploadReport(UploadReportRequest)
QueryReportListResponse queryReportList(QueryReportListRequest)
GetReportDetailResponse getReportDetail(GetReportDetailRequest)
```

### AccountManagementAPI
```java
LoginResponse login(LoginRequest)
RegisterResponse register(RegisterRequest)
GetUserInfoResponse getUserInfo(GetUserInfoRequest)
UpdateUserInfoResponse updateUserInfo(UpdateUserInfoRequest)
UpdatePasswordResponse updatePassword(UpdatePasswordRequest)
DeleteUserResponse deleteUser(DeleteUserRequest)
UpdateUserRolesResponse updateUserRoles(UpdateUserRolesRequest)
```

### UserIdentityAPI
```java
GetDoctorInfoResponse getDoctorInfo(GetDoctorInfoRequest)
GetDoctorInfoResponse getDoctorInfoByAccountId(Long accountId)
GetPatientInfoResponse getPatientInfo(GetPatientInfoRequest)
GetPatientInfoResponse getPatientInfoByAccountId(Long accountId)
```

### DoctorWorkbenchAPI
```java
GenerateScheduleResponse generateScheduleSuggestion(GenerateScheduleRequest)
QueryScheduleResponse querySchedule(QueryScheduleRequest)
GetScheduleDetailResponse getScheduleDetail(Long scheduleId, Long doctorId)
CompleteScheduleResponse completeSchedule(CompleteScheduleRequest)
CancelScheduleResponse cancelSchedule(Long scheduleId, Long doctorId, String reason)
UpdateScheduleStatusResponse updateScheduleStatus(Long scheduleId, Long doctorId, String status)
GetDoctorInfoResponse getDoctorInfo(Long doctorId)
```

### MessageAPI
```java
SendMessageResponse sendMessage/broadcastMessage(Long senderId, SendMessageRequest)
QueryMessageResponse queryInbox/querySentBox(Long userId, QueryMessageRequest)
GetMessageDetailResponse getMessageDetail(Long userId, Long messageId)
MarkAsReadResponse markAsRead/batchMarkAsRead(Long userId, Long/List<Long> messageIds)
RevokeMessageResponse revokeMessage(Long userId, Long messageId)
DeleteMessageResponse deleteMessage/batchDeleteMessage(Long userId, Long/List<Long> messageIds)
UnreadCountResponse getUnreadCount(Long userId)
PushMessageResponse pushMessage(PushMessageRequest)
BatchPushMessageResponse batchPushMessage(BatchPushMessageRequest)
```

### JwtAPI
```java
GenTokenResponse genToken(GenTokenRequest) // userId, username, roles, permissions
RefreshTokenResponse refreshToken(RefreshTokenRequest)
```

### TokenValidationAPI
```java
ValidateTokenResponse validateToken(ValidateTokenRequest)
ValidateTokenResponse revokeToken(ValidateTokenRequest)
```

### PermissionServiceAPI
```java
GetUserPermissionResponse getUserPermission(GetUserPermissionRequest)
HasPermissionResponse hasPermission(HasPermissionRequest)
```

### Third-Party APIs
```java
// OSSAPI
OSSUploadFileResponse uploadFile(OSSUploadFileRequest)
OSSMultiUploadFileResponse multiUpload(OSSMultiUploadFileRequest)

// SMSAPI
SendSMSResponse sendSMS(SendSMSRequest)

// EmailAPI
SendEmailResponse sendMail/sendHTMLMail(SendEmailRequest)
SendEmailResponse sendAttachmentEmail(SendAttachEmailRequest)
```

## 4. Gateway Configuration

### Routes (application.yaml)
| Route ID | Path | Target | Filter |
|----------|------|--------|--------|
| auth-service | /auth/** | lb://auth-provider | StripPrefix=1 |
| account-service | /account/** | lb://account-service | StripPrefix=1 |
| order-service | /order/** | lb://order-service | StripPrefix=1 |

### Key Configs
- **CORS**: Allow all origins/methods/headers, credentials enabled
- **Redis**: Reactive template for rate limiting
- **Sentinel**: Flow control + degrade rules from Nacos
- **HTTP Client**: Connection pool (100 max, 20/route), 5s read timeout

## 5. Security Configuration

### SecurityConfig (auth-provider)
- BCryptPasswordEncoder
- CSRF disabled (JWT-based)
- Stateless session
- @EnableMethodSecurity

### JwtConfig
- RSA 2048-bit key pair (dynamic generation)
- NimbusJwtEncoder/Decoder

### WebMvcConfig (interceptors)
```
UserInfoExtractInterceptor: /** 
Exclude: /error, /actuator/**, /swagger-ui/**, /v3/api-docs/**
```

### Auth Consumer WebMvcConfig
```
UserInfoInterceptor: /**
Exclude: /auth/login, /auth/register, /auth/sms/code, /auth/refresh, /error
```

## 6. Key Dependencies

| Component | External Dependencies |
|-----------|----------------------|
| Gateway | Nacos, Redis, Sentinel, Dubbo |
| Auth | Redis, Spring Security OAuth2 JWT |
| Account | MySQL, MyBatis-Plus, Nacos |
| Health Report | MySQL, OSS, Nacos, Dubbo |
| Doctor | MySQL, MyBatis-Plus, Nacos, Dubbo |
| Message | MySQL, Redis, Nacos, Dubbo |
| Third-Party | Alibaba OSS, SMS Gateway, Email Service |

## 7. Security Risks & Mitigations

| Risk | Location | Mitigation |
|------|----------|------------|
| Hardcoded AES keys | application.yml | Use env vars: ENCRYPTION_AES_KEY/IV |
| Dynamic RSA keys | JwtConfig | Load from config/KMS in production |
| CORS allow all + credentials | CorsConfiguration | Restrict origins in production |
| SQL injection | Controllers | Use MyBatis parameterized queries |
| File upload attacks | HealthReportController | MIME whitelist, size limit, suffix validation |
| Rate limiting bypass | SMS | Redis-based rate limiter configured |

## 8. Integration Examples

### Dubbo Consumer Reference
```java
@DubboReference(version = "1.0.0", check = false)
private HealthReportAPI healthReportAPI;
```

### Gateway JWT Validation
```java
ValidateTokenResponse response = tokenValidationAPI.validateToken(request);
// Extract: userId, username, roles, authorities
```

### User Context Access
```java
Long userId = UserInfoManager.getUserIdOrThrow();
String traceId = UserInfoManager.getTraceId();
```
